SEARCH
Package edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation

Class AutomationHub

java.lang.Object
edu.yu.cs.com3810.automation.AutomationHub
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAutomationHub
public class AutomationHub extends Object implements IAutomationHub
Concrete implementation of IAutomationHub.

Manages an in-memory collection of AutomationRule objects. Subscribes to the EVENT topic on startup and evaluates each incoming DeviceEvent against all active rules. When a rule matches, it constructs a Command and publishes it to the COMMAND topic so the target device can act.

  • Constructor Details

    • AutomationHub

      public AutomationHub(String hubId, IMessageBus messageBus)
      Constructs the AutomationHub.
      Parameters:
      hubId - a unique identifier for this hub on the message bus
      messageBus - the shared message bus instance

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start()
      Starts the Automation Hub: registers with the message bus and subscribes to the EVENT topic to begin receiving input device events.

      Registers this hub with the message bus and subscribes to the EVENT topic, wiring incoming messages to handleEvent(DeviceEvent).

      Specified by:
      start in interface IAutomationHub

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the Automation Hub and unsubscribes from all message bus topics.
      Specified by:
      stop in interface IAutomationHub

    • addRule

      public void addRule(AutomationRule rule)
      Adds a new automation rule. The rule becomes active immediately and will be evaluated against all subsequent events.
      Specified by:
      addRule in interface IAutomationHub
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule to add

    • removeRule

      public void removeRule(String ruleId)
      Removes an existing automation rule by its ID. Has no effect if no rule with the given ID exists.
      Specified by:
      removeRule in interface IAutomationHub
      Parameters:
      ruleId - the ID of the rule to remove

    • setRuleActive

      public void setRuleActive(String ruleId, boolean active)
      Enables or disables an existing rule without removing it.
      Specified by:
      setRuleActive in interface IAutomationHub
      Parameters:
      ruleId - the ID of the rule to update
      active - true to activate the rule, false to deactivate it

    • getAllRules

      public List<AutomationRule> getAllRules()
      Returns all automation rules currently managed by this hub, including both active and inactive rules.
      Specified by:
      getAllRules in interface IAutomationHub
      Returns:
      list of all AutomationRule instances

    • handleEvent

      public void handleEvent(DeviceEvent event)
      Processes an incoming event from an input device.

      Called by the hub's EVENT topic subscription handler each time a DeviceEvent arrives on the message bus. The hub evaluates all active rules against the event and, for each match, publishes a command to the COMMAND topic.

      Iterates over all active rules. A rule matches if:
      1. The rule's triggerDeviceType matches the event's source device type.
      2. The rule's triggerEventType matches the event's event type string.
      3. The rule's triggerDeviceId is either null (wildcard) or matches the event's source device ID.
      For each matching rule, a Command is built and published to the COMMAND topic.
      Specified by:
      handleEvent in interface IAutomationHub
      Parameters:
      event - the event received from an input device
